  1. Homepage
  2. Our Story
  3. Purpose

Purpose

We help travelers explore the world. One journey at a time.

Made for the way you travel

We help travelers explore and experience the world — making every trip easier and more memorable, one journey at a time.

Who we are

The global travel marketplace for every journey

Where people, partnerships, and technology come together to make travel easy — giving travelers the confidence to explore.

What we do

Power endless possibilities

We bring together travelers, partners, and advertisers into one single marketplace, expanding the value of travel through iconic brands, a leading B2B network, and advertising.

How we do it

Reimagining the future of travel

Our global teams shape travel and create journeys that are more personal, connected, and seamless — while setting a new standard for how travel drives growth and lasting impact.

 

 

Explore open roles

Built for better travel

For over 30 years, we’ve cultivated the tools and services that help travelers explore, partners grow, and make travel more open and inclusive for everyone.

Brands travelers trust

For decades, millions of people have explored the world with the help of our family of brands, including Expedia, Hotels.com, and Vrbo.

Category-leading B2B network

The largest, most connected B2B travel network, driving growth and opening up travel for more businesses.​

Premier advertising network

Travel advertising that helps brands tell the right story, to the right traveler, at the right time — every time.

Deep travel intelligence

We combine advanced AI tools with our team’s vast knowledge to personalize experiences and make travel easier and smarter for both travelers and partners.

One place for everything travel

Our platforms unite high-quality supply, partnerships, services, data, and technology. We don't just give travelers and partners a wealth of options, we give them the best options.

Explore more opportunities

From experiencing our brands to building partnerships or investing in the future of travel, find the path that fits you.

Travel with us

Whether it’s the trip of a lifetime, a weekend escape, or an ambitious business itinerary, we’re here to help you travel the world with confidence.

Explore our brands
Partner with us

Join a network of partners around the world. Discover how an Expedia Group partnership can help you grow your travel business.

Join us
Inside our business

We're powering travel for hundreds of millions of travelers. Explore our growth, market impact, and financial performance.

Follow our updates
